title: GateLM v2 Safety Domain Outcome Draft
description: Draft supporting schema for the AI Safety & Evaluation Lab slice of the v2 gateway outcome. This describes only the safety domain outcome and is not a standalone API, DB, Event, or Metrics contract.

outcome.description: Contracted v2 safety domain outcome. Values follow docs/v2.0.0/contracts.md section 6.4.

detectorSummary.description: Draft/candidate field for sanitized detector summary only. It must not contain raw detected values, raw offsets, raw prompt fragments, raw prompt, raw response, credentials, or Authorization header values.

detectedCount.description: Draft/candidate count of detections after safety evaluation. This is a count only, not raw detected content.

detectorCategories.description: Draft/candidate low-cardinality detector category summary. Category values are intentionally strings and not fixed provider/model-style enums, but they must be sanitized labels only.

policyBasis.description: Draft/candidate provenance hint for the published RuntimeSnapshot policy basis used by safety. Full RuntimeSnapshot body and full policy body must not be copied here.
